steps.title: Find the key principle
steps.content: The passage establishes a rule: wood rots quickly unless protected by sediment from oxygen. Since archaeologists found and identified much of the wooden hull, the wood must have survived in the quarry.

steps.title: Apply the principle to the answer
steps.content: The survival of the wood proves the ship was covered by protective sediment—exactly what Choice A — covered by a protective sediment layer in the quarry. states. The other choices either assume facts not in the passage, address irrelevant details, or contradict the given timeline. That matches Choice A — covered by a protective sediment layer in the quarry..
